TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lazaro_Borrell, title = Lazaro_Borrell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lazaro_Borrell} }

S.FORM: Lazaro Borrell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972 , ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 9, Lazaro Borrell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lazaro Borrell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1972 , ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 9, Lazaro Borrell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lazaro βorrell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lazaro βorrell, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
